title: Design plant displays
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design plant displays demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop the design concept plan

pcs.text: Consult with client to establish purpose and requirements of design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client to establish purpose and requirements of design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client to establish purpose and requirements of design.

pcs.text: Evaluate site or location for aesthetic, environmental and physical attributes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate site or location for aesthetic, environmental and physical attributes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate site or location for aesthetic, environmental and physical attributes.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks in workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks in workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Determine timelines for display and incorporate into plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine timelines for display and incorporate into plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine timelines for display and incorporate into plan.

pcs.text: Clarify budget parameters for concept plan with client or manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify budget parameters for concept plan with client or manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify budget parameters for concept plan with client or manager.

pcs.text: Develop concept plan using common horticultural conventions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop concept plan using common horticultural conventions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop concept plan using common horticultural conventions.

elements.title: Ensure compliance with the design plan

pcs.text: Present concept plan to client and negotiate agreement on design

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present concept plan to client and negotiate agreement on design.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop final design plan documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop final design plan documentation.

pcs.text: Inspect plants and display materials prior to installation to ensure they meet required quality standard
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect plants and display materials prior to installation to ensure they meet required quality standard?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect plants and display materials prior to installation to ensure they meet required quality standard.

pcs.text: Inspect plant display to ensure compliance with design plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect plant display to ensure compliance with design plan.
